message:
🐛 Guard OPA agent fetch and GitOps drift detection in demo mode

OPAPolicies was fetching http://127.0.0.1:8585/clusters directly without
a demo mode check, producing console errors on console.kubestellar.io.
GitOps was calling /api/gitops/detect-drift on mount, which 404s on the
Netlify deploy since there is no backend. Skip both in demo mode.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
